initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
  income_band.ib_lower_bound,
  income_band.ib_upper_bound,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
  income_band.ib_lower_bound,
  income_band.ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count, 
  income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
  income_band.ib_upper_bound, 
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count, 
  income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
  income_band.ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100

    JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
    household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
    income_band.ib_lower_bound,
    income_band.ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count, 
  income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
  income_band.ib_upper_bound, 
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count, 
  income_band.ib_lower_bound, 
  income_band.ib_upper_bound
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
  income_band.ib_lower_bound,
  income_band.ib_upper_bound,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
  income_band.ib_lower_bound,
  income_band.ib_upper_bound
ORDER BY 
  household_demographics.hd_dep_count,
  income_band.ib_lower_bound
LIMIT 100

  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN income_band ON household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk = income_band.ib_income_band_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY
